canonical_modules.run_byon.py: REAL-mode launcher: starts memory-service child + Gateway + UI; LocalBYONBackend forbidden in REAL
canonical_modules.gateway/app.py: FastAPI Gateway: the only public surface; no raw memory/engine exposure; final audit enforced
canonical_modules.gateway/epistemic_search.py: epistemic search loop (memory -> candidates -> Claude hypothesis -> web); relation context injection
canonical_modules.gateway/source_policy.py: query_class + source_class gating; canonical constraints; the source-bleed boundary
canonical_modules.gateway/consistent_client.py: read-consistent client wrapper over the memory-service (tombstone-filtered)
canonical_modules.gateway/candidate_lifecycle.py: candidate-to-commit lifecycle; consolidation is the only state-mover
canonical_modules.gateway/lifeloop.py: LifeLoop v2: internal circulation; never answers the user; never a truth authority
canonical_modules.gateway/relation_field.py: relational memory field: entities + typed relations; decay; never a truth authority
canonical_modules.gateway/relation_policy.py: relation-type source policy (objective relations need verified sources)
canonical_modules.gateway/relation_inference.py: grounded relation inference (deterministic + canonical + opt-in Claude advisory)
canonical_modules.gateway/relation_reports.py: relation reports + grounded path explanation + relation-aware answer context
canonical_modules.gateway/vault_training.py: vault indexing into the canonical memory-service (single-writer, dedup, coherent report)
canonical_modules.scripts/live_byon_eval.py: live evaluation harness (178 graded gates across cycles 1-13)

external_dependencies.byon_optimus_orchestrator: github.com/NEURALMORPHIC-FIELDS/byon_optimus, consumed at runtime under external/ (not vendored)
external_dependencies.fcem_v15_7a: sealed FCE-M consolidator resolved via FCEM_MEMORY_ENGINE_ROOT; not bundled; mandatory for release validation
external_dependencies.memory_service: canonical FastAPI + FAISS + trust tiers + FCE-M; the ONLY store; never bypassed

boundaries.memory_service_FCEM_DCortex: accessed only through the canonical client/backend; no raw FAISS/FCE-M/D_Cortex endpoints are exposed
boundaries.gateway_only_public_surface: all external access goes through gateway/app.py /v1/* with mandatory user_id+session_id, per-user namespace, audit trace, and final audit
boundaries.ui: the UI calls the Gateway client only, never memory-service or Claude directly

forbidden_duplicates: no second epistemic_search / source_policy / memory_service_backend / candidate_lifecycle / relation_field
no parallel vector store besides the canonical memory-service
no copy of a canonical module (verify_integration.py flags byte-identical copies as DUPLICATE)

sealed_or_closed.dcortex/: v10.0 milestone code, CLOSED; not modified by hygiene/cycle work
sealed_or_closed.external/: sealed/vendored at runtime; not scanned or modified

verification: python verify_integration.py (all critical modules WIRED, no boundary violation) + python scripts/check_style_contract.py
